edges.evidence_quote: They were harassed and jumped (physically assaulted) by white gangs such as the Simon City Royals , Almighty Gaylords and Harrison Gents.
edges.context: Simon City Royals harassed and assaulted the precursor club of Maniac Latin Disciples.

edges.evidence_quote: They were harassed and jumped (physically assaulted) by white gangs such as the Simon City Royals , Almighty Gaylords and Harrison Gents.
edges.context: Almighty Gaylords harassed and assaulted the precursor club of Maniac Latin Disciples.

edges.evidence_quote: They were harassed and jumped (physically assaulted) by white gangs such as the Simon City Royals , Almighty Gaylords and Harrison Gents.
edges.context: Harrison Gents harassed and assaulted the precursor club of Maniac Latin Disciples.

edges.evidence_quote: The club fought back to protect themselves and got respect on the street, earning them back-up from the Black Disciples .
edges.context: Black Disciples provided backup to the Latin Disciples.

edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Scorpions merged with another Latino club ran by Ernesto “Capper” Flores and turned into a full-fledged gang in 1966, calling themselves the Latin Disciples.
edges.context: Latin Scorpions merged with another club to form the Latin Disciples.

edges.evidence_quote: They had a meeting with the Black Gangster Disciples (today split into the Black Disciples and Gangster Disciples) and established a business relationship on the inside and outside.
edges.context: Latin Disciples established a business relationship with Black Gangster Disciples.

edges.evidence_quote: From then on the Latin Disciples Nation went to war with the Latin Kings.
edges.context: Latin Disciples went to war with Latin Kings after Hernandez's killing.

edges.evidence_quote: A year later, Chi-Chi D, the Latin Disciple President of KB, was gunned down by Insane Unknowns.
edges.context: Insane Unknown Kings killed a Latin Disciple president, leading to conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Disciples Nation joined the "Folks Alliance" of gangs in 1978, becoming enemies of all People Nations like the Black P Stones , PR Stones, Spanish Lords, Vice Lords and Latin Kings whom the MLD’s already hated.
edges.context: Maniac Latin Disciples became enemies of Black P. Stones as part of Folks Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Disciples Nation joined the "Folks Alliance" of gangs in 1978, becoming enemies of all People Nations like the Black P Stones , PR Stones, Spanish Lords, Vice Lords and Latin Kings whom the MLD’s already hated.
edges.context: Maniac Latin Disciples became enemies of PR Stones as part of Folks Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Disciples Nation joined the "Folks Alliance" of gangs in 1978, becoming enemies of all People Nations like the Black P Stones , PR Stones, Spanish Lords, Vice Lords and Latin Kings whom the MLD’s already hated.
edges.context: Maniac Latin Disciples became enemies of Spanish Lords as part of Folks Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Disciples Nation joined the "Folks Alliance" of gangs in 1978, becoming enemies of all People Nations like the Black P Stones , PR Stones, Spanish Lords, Vice Lords and Latin Kings whom the MLD’s already hated.
edges.context: Maniac Latin Disciples became enemies of Vice Lords as part of Folks Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: After fighting together as brothers for two decades, the Maniac Latin Disciples and Insane Spanish Cobras began having friction around 1994 over drug territory.
edges.context: Maniac Latin Disciples and Spanish Cobras had friction over drug territory, leading to conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: With the Latin Disciples joining Folks, the Spanish Cobras , Imperial Gangsters , and Latin Eagles immediately followed due to the United Latino Organization they had on the street.
edges.context: Imperial Gangsters followed Latin Disciples into Folks Alliance, indicating cooperation.

edges.evidence_quote: With the Latin Disciples joining Folks, the Spanish Cobras , Imperial Gangsters , and Latin Eagles immediately followed due to the United Latino Organization they had on the street.
edges.context: Latin Eagles followed Latin Disciples into Folks Alliance, indicating cooperation.

edges.evidence_quote: At one point the gang was heavily involved with the prison Spanish Gangster Disciples unity of Latino Folks inside, which is different than the street gang SGDN, whose founding members were former Maniac Latin Disciples.
edges.context: Maniac Latin Disciples were involved with prison Spanish Gangster Disciples; founding members of SGDN were former MLDs.

edges.context: Four Corner Hustlers listed as rival in infobox.
